name: Golden slumbers
description: BATH BOMB: Soak in glittering golden waters of calming chamomile and lavender, while a clearing shot of neroli cuts through your thoughts.
archive_note: Golden Slumbers bath bomb has appeared as a Kitchen and seasonal exclusive, celebrated for its golden glittering waters and sleep-focused botanical blend of chamomile, lavender, and neroli
nostalgia_angle: The name is a nod to the beloved Beatles song, instantly evoking warmth and nostalgia — fans of Lush's sleep range adore this bath bomb for combining glittering, golden visuals with genuinely calming botanicals
throwback_reference: Shares its lavender and chamomile sleep-inducing DNA with the wider Lush sleep range, with neroli adding a brightening, clarifying twist reminiscent of products like Twilight
